item.title: High Yield Revival: 3 Cash-Rich Dividend Payers on Sale
item.description: Market rotation is driving investors toward dependable income; these high-yield dividend stocks offer strong cash flow and defensive positioning

item.title: DTE’s Stargate Deal Turns Power Into Profits
item.description: See why DTE Energy is being framed as an AI power play: Stargate load growth, beat-and-raise results, higher capex through 2030, and key risks.

item.title: Can RSG Stock Turn Guidance Into Gains in 2026?
item.description: Republic Services delivers steady earnings and modest 2026 growth, positioning RSG as a defensive stock with stable cash flow and dividend support

item.title: Garmin Jumps on Guidance, Then Doubles Down on Buybacks and a Bigger Dividend
item.description: Garmin is well-positioned to dominate consumer tech through AI. Its results and capital return plans highlight the strengths.

item.title: Draganfly’s CEO Says Drones Are Becoming Intelligence Platforms—Not Just Hardware
item.description: Draganfly argues that drones are shifting to intelligence platforms. See defense demand signals, “made-here” trends, and recent AFSOC training/FPV mom...
